case_title: LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC VS. ZOILA A MORATAYA et al

docket_entries.description: ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MORATAYA, ZOILA A $9,558.97 PRINCIPAL, $400.69 INTEREST, $410.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,369.66, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC AS TO DEFENDANT MORATAYA, ZOILA A DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-14-2009
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT AND COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF LIVINGSTON FINANCIAL LLC SERVED AUG-19-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MORATAYA, ZOILA A
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT MORATAYA, ZOILA A
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
